//: Visual baselines. Run against a LOCAL build, not the live site — `npm run build && npm start`,
//3: --update to accept a change. These exist because geometry cannot be unit-tested here: the suite
//4: runs under happy-dom, which has no layout engine, so getBoundingClientRect returns zeros. Every
//5: shot below is a bug that actually shipped.

shots.name: arch-topography-mobile
shots.//: 17 desktop rows collapse to 26 hand-written mobile ones. Nothing else pins that map.

shots.name: arch-cicd-mobile
shots.//: Was a 1280px SVG that scaled to 0.266x: 12px labels at ~3.2px, the whole slide 217px tall
shots.//2: against its siblings' 1720. If this shot ever shrinks like that again, it is that bug returning.

shots.name: arch-cicd-desktop
shots.//: The three worlds side by side. Guards the reflow from the other direction.

shots.name: arch-security-mobile
shots.//: A min-width:460px table inside a sideways scroller.

shots.name: arch-tabs-mobile
shots.//: Four tabs do not fit 390px. Plain `center` stranded the first and last off both edges with no
shots.//2: way to scroll to them; `safe center` is what makes them reachable. This shot is that guarantee.
